title: The Cruel Angels Thesis Cover Thread

wikitext:
[]: The Cruel Angel's Thesis Cover Thread             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Fri May 03, 2013 10:47 am Basically, a thread to post your favourite covers of A Cruel Angel's Thesis. Doesn't have to be yours, just has to be awesome. Myself, I am quite fond of this version .

[]:             Quote Post by Catamari » Fri May 03, 2013 10:52 am I wish Germans wouldn't bloody clap during the song. Scheisse! Regardless, I do love this one.

[]:             Quote Post by Dovah » Fri May 03, 2013 9:02 pm English version by Geekyfandubs. [url]http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=C5cz0V18_7s[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by Fifth » Sat May 04, 2013 6:38 am Best one. [url]http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vm41jq-1a8g[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Sat May 04, 2013 12:11 pm No, this is best version.

[]:             Quote Post by Catamari » Sat May 04, 2013 12:33 pm riffraff11235 wrote: No, this is best version.
